headline: Elliot Anderson

text:
Manchester City remain optimistic they can strike a deal for Anderson to join this summer despite Nottingham Forest’s demands.⬇️


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

🚨 Manchester City have made a bid totalling £121m for Elliot Anderson to Nottingham Forest. Guaranteed fee is £106m.

Nottingham Forest are now asking for a British transfer record fee.

#MCFC wanted to bid before the World Cup fearing Anderson’s price could rise further at the tournament.

Manchester United view the cost as too high despite seeing Anderson as their dream target. They are in talks with Matheus Fernandes. Alex Scott and Carlos Baleba remain other names on their radar.





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2064800049788538911#m
